highlights.text: My general lean is to defer to the trend.
My general lean is as long as bulls hold support then we simply resume up to 6843, 6852, then 6877+.” Today we filled this out exactly.
That footprint is the Failed Breakdown and occurs when institutions trap shorts by faking below a low.
Last Tuesday at 9:40AM, we flushed 6701 (there was a big shelf of lows there set on Monday/early Tuesday) to 6675, then recovered 6701 for a Failed Breakdown.
At the close yesterday, I defined the range as being 6811 to 6843, stating: “ES is consolidating 6811 to 6843 with a 6825 magnet in the middle.

post_title: After Last Weeks Non-Stop Rally, SPX is Resting, Coiled Tight. A Move Is Coming. What Way? Dec 3rd Plan
